stem: A store offers a 20% discount on a laptop originally priced at $800. After the discount, a 10% sales tax is applied to the discounted price. What is the total amount the customer pays?

distractorRationale.B: Student netted the discount and tax (20% − 10% = 10% net discount): $800 × 0.90 = $720.
distractorRationale.C: Student applied only the discount and forgot to add the tax: $800 × 0.80 = $640.
distractorRationale.D: Student applied the tax first to the original price then added: $800 × 1.10 = $880.
